title: Structure of a Wide Column Store (Column Family)
description: This diagram visualizes the hierarchical, multi-dimensional data model of a Wide Column NoSQL system, contrasting it with a simple key-value store and showing how data is organized into column families.
relationships: A Row Key points to one or more Column Families. Each Column Family contains one or more Column Qualifiers. Each Column Qualifier contains a Cell Value, which is versioned by a Timestamp.
